data.title: Ping An Launches "Service Year 2026": Upgrades AI‑Powered Express Service and Global Emergency Assistance
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Hong Kong and Shanghai, Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd. revealed significant enhancements to its AI-powered Express Service and Global Emergency Assistance. The company, traded as HKEX: 2318/82318 and SSE: 601318, introduced these updates as part of its latest initiative.

data.title: Lithia & Driveway (LAD) Schedules Release of First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: A company based in Medford, Oregon, Lithia & Driveway (NYSE: LAD), has revealed that its earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 and full-year results will be disclosed prior to the market opening on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following this release, a conference call to review the financial performance has been set for the same day at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: AAVE price may recover to $98-105 by early May despite current pressure; bears control below key resistance at $98.99.
data.description: It is anticipated that the price of AAVE could see a rebound to approximately $98-105 by the beginning of May due to oversold conditions. However, bears are currently dominating the market, keeping the price below the critical resistance level of $98.99.

data.title: CEX exchange reserves soar to $225B, as Bitget & MEXC see 262%+ growth. Institutional platforms witness asset outflow.
data.description: CoinGecko's report on centralized exchanges for 2026 shows exchange reserves totaling $225.4 billion. The report highlights significant growth of over 262% for Bitget and MEXC, contrasting with institutional platforms experiencing a loss in assets.
